Facebook is making big changes on real estate listings read below this starts Jan 2023
MetroTex Association of REALTORS
October 12, 2022
 
·
Starting Jan. 30, 2023, you will no longer be able to create real estate sales and rental listings using your Facebook business page. In addition, all existing listings created from Facebook business pages will be deleted. Here's what you need to know . . . See less
